mapper.sql: r.id AS r_id, r.rating AS r_rating, r.comment AS r_comment, r.created_at AS r_created_at, r.updated_at AS r_updated_at, p.id AS p_id, pu.id AS pu_id, pu.name AS pu_name, pu.mobile_number AS pu_mobile_number, pu.email AS pu_email, pu.role AS pu_role, pu.is_active AS pu_is_active, pu.created_at AS pu_created_at, pu.updated_at AS pu_updated_at, d.id AS d_id, du.id AS du_id, du.name AS du_name, du.mobile_number AS du_mobile_number, du.email AS du_email, du.role AS du_role, du.is_active AS du_is_active, du.created_at AS du_created_at, du.updated_at AS du_updated_at, a.id AS a_id, a.code AS a_code

FROM reviews r JOIN patients p ON p.id = r.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id JOIN doctors d ON d.id = r.doctor_id JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.id = r.appointment_id
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0) AS averageRating, COUNT(*) AS totalReviews, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fiveStar, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fourStar, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS threeStar, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS twoStar, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS oneStar FROM reviews WHERE doctor_id = #{profId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_id, rating, comment, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{patient.id}, #{doctor.id}, #{appointment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rating}, #{comment}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET patient_id = #{patient.id}, doctor_id = #{doctor.id}, appointment_id = #{appointment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, rating = #{rating}, comment = #{comment}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
